item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 171700Z AUTO 29010KT CAVOK 15/09 Q1013 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA SCT020TCU BECMG 22010KT
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 171237Z 1712/1812 22010KT 9999 SCT025 TEMPO 1712/1724 4000 -SHRA SCT020TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1712/1716 2500 -TSRA SCT020CB PROB30 TEMPO 1803/1807 BKN004 BECMG 1805/1807 BKN008 BECMG 1807/1810 BKN030
